# AdisInsight MCP Server

Access Springer Nature's AdisInsight platform for drug development pipeline intelligence, including clinical trial progress and deal tracking.

## Access

Requires a **Springer Nature AdisInsight subscription**. Contact Springer Nature for access.

## Setup

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "adisinsight": {
      "type": "http",
      "url": "https://adisinsight-mcp.springer.com/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```

## Capabilities

- Search drug development pipelines by compound, indication, or company
- Track clinical trial phase transitions and outcomes
- Access deal and licensing intelligence
- Retrieve competitive landscape analysis for therapeutic areas

## Source

Maintained by [Springer Nature](https://adisinsight.springer.com/).
